title: Expanded Spear Enchantings
description: This Datapack and Mod allow to use Fire Aspect, Knockback, Looting, Impaling, Density, Breach, and Wind Burst. It also allows you to mixing different Weapon Enchantments Types on the same Spear!
body: # Expanded Spear Enchantings **This Datapack and Mod** expands the Weapon Enchantments to include Fire Aspect, Knockback, Looting, Impaling, Density, Breach, and Wind Burst on an Spear. It also allows you to mix different weapon enchantment types on the same Spear **‎◾Examples:** ![Expanded Spear Enchantings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d923114fe5db4d596af38e7452c6dcbd5d935d34.jpeg) ## Details📝 - **Expanded Spear Enchantings** is **compatible** with versions **1.21.11** - **Expanded Spear Enchantings** adds new **(expansion)** to enchanting table🌐 - **Expanded Spear Enchantings** is compatible with any **enchantings datapacks** - **No** it is necessary to **unzip** the downloaded file 🗂️ ## More Projects:
